response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to event-driven systems and agentic tooling, but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams beyond 10 people, or designing financial risk/credit systems — critical gaps for a CTO role requiring executive leadership and deep fintech-AI integration.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP-like tooling at re:cinq
Proven track record in event-driven, distributed systems (GISCollective, DLang microservices)
Strong engineering culture contributions through workshops, TDD, and open-source tooling
concerns: No demonstrated experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulatory compliance
Lacks evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
No clear production track record in real-time AI decisioning for financial operations
